title: Fix Admin Panel: Contact update and image upload failures

requirements.text: Investigate and fix the 'Failed to update contacts' error in the Admin Panel Contacts tab. Ensure that saving WhatsApp Number and Instagram Profile URL changes calls the correct backend mutation, handles errors gracefully, and shows a success toast on completion.

quotes: updating the details and uploading the image in Admin panel doesn't create any issues

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Save Changes' on the Contacts tab successfully persists the WhatsApp number and Instagram URL to the backend.
A success toast/notification is shown when contacts are saved successfully.
If the save fails, a descriptive error message is displayed instead of a generic failure toast.
The Contacts tab does not show 'Failed to update contacts' when valid data is submitted.

requirements.text: Investigate and fix image upload failures in the Admin Panel (Site Media tab and Projects tab). Ensure that uploading logo, cover image, artist portrait, and project images correctly encodes the blob data, calls the appropriate backend update functions, and completes without error.

quotes: uploading the image in Admin panel doesn't create any issues

acceptanceCriteria: Uploading a logo, cover image, or portrait image in the Site Media tab succeeds and the new image is reflected on the portfolio page.
Uploading or replacing a project image in the Projects tab succeeds without error.
A success notification is shown after a successful image upload.
An informative error message is shown if an image upload fails, without crashing the Admin Panel.

requirements.text: Audit the backend Motoko actor's update functions for media contacts and blob storage (logo, cover, portrait, artwork images) to ensure they are correctly defined, accept the right argument types, and are accessible to authenticated callers. Fix any type mismatches or missing authorization checks causing call failures.

quotes: updating the details and uploading the image in Admin panel doesn't create any issues

acceptanceCriteria: The backend exposes working update functions for media contacts (WhatsApp, Instagram) that persist changes to stable storage.
The backend exposes working update functions for blob assets (logo, cover, portrait, artwork images) that accept and store Blob/[Nat8] data.
All update functions return a success or error variant that the frontend can distinguish.
No type mismatch errors occur between frontend actor calls and backend function signatures.

requirements.text: Audit the frontend React Query mutation hooks in useQueries.ts for updating media contacts and uploading images. Ensure the mutation functions correctly serialize arguments, call the actor methods with the right parameter types, and invalidate relevant queries on success.

quotes: updating the details and uploading the image in Admin panel doesn't create any issues

acceptanceCriteria: The useUpdateContacts (or equivalent) mutation hook correctly passes WhatsApp and Instagram values to the backend actor.
Image upload mutation hooks correctly convert File/Blob objects to the Nat8 array format expected by the backend.
On successful mutation, the relevant queries (contacts, logo, cover, portrait, artworks) are invalidated so the UI reflects the latest data.
Mutation error states are captured and surfaced to the Admin Panel UI.

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
Preserve existing stable storage and data model in the backend; do not drop or rename existing fields.
nonGoals: Redesigning the Admin Panel UI layout or visual styling.
Adding new admin features beyond fixing existing contact update and image upload flows.
